text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Osaka Hai, Maruzensky begins to train
harder than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, she is worried about Grass
Wonder and Special Week, who seem
disheartened...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's fears are proven correct when Grass
Wonder suffers an injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky can't just stand by as they overexert
themselves, so she tells them about the
importance of having fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking her advice, the two athletes successfully
get back on track.
